# Avante Ventures

> AI-native venture studio combining Silicon Valley playbooks with Brazil-native execution. We co-found AI-native companies from scratch, built to compound for decades.

> Trilingual site: English at `/en/*`, Portuguese (pt-BR) at `/pt/*`, Spanish (Latin American) at `/es/*`. All three locales are equally canonical and indexed via hreflang. Featured articles are translated across all three locales. Root URL `/` 301-redirects to `/en` as the default canonical entry.

## What we do

Avante Ventures is an early-stage venture studio operating in Brazil and broader LATAM. We co-found and operate AI-native companies, providing first-ticket capital, hands-on operational support, and access to Silicon Valley playbooks adapted for the Brazilian market.

Our model: pre-traction capital + repeatable operational system + in-market execution. We launch 3-4 ventures per year and hold to compound.

## Sectors and expertise

- AI-native SaaS for Brazilian service economies
- Workflow automation for fragmented industries
- Pre-traction venture building
- Founder operational support
- Cashflow-first unit economics from day one

## Geography

- Brazil (primary market)
- Latin America (LATAM-wide thesis)
- US / Silicon Valley (capital and playbook source)

## Differentiators

- Venture studios outperform traditional VC in returns (50% annual returns per GSSN report)
- First-ticket advantage: investing before consensus + operational support compounds
- Brazil-native execution: SF venture-building standards adapted to fragmented LATAM markets
- AI-native approach: AI is core to product design, not bolted on

## Pages (English)

- [Home](https://avanteventures.com/en): Mission, model, ventures, team, contact
- [Why Avante](https://avanteventures.com/en/why-avante): Investment thesis, returns data, comparison vs traditional VC
- [Library](https://avanteventures.com/en/library): Insights, research reports, case studies, playbooks, Brazil-specific market analyses
- [Portfolio](https://avanteventures.com/en/portfolio): Active studio cohort, realized exits (Sigga 10×), and alumni ventures from the founding team
- [For LPs / Investors](https://avanteventures.com/en/investors): Thesis, structure, and the transparency block ("what we will not do")
- [Operating Principles](https://avanteventures.com/en/principles): The 10 rules the Avante studio operates by. Not values — rules that constrain behavior. Published as competitive doctrine.

## Featured Articles (full long-form, citable)

- [Why Venture Studios Outperform Traditional VC](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studios-outperform-traditional-vc): The data on the 50% IRR vs 19% IRR gap, with the three structural advantages that explain it. Research Report, 12 min read.
- [The First Ticket Advantage: A Framework](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/first-ticket-advantage-framework): Why the first ticket determines venture returns more than picking ability — plus the four-filter framework Avante uses. Playbook, 8 min.
- [Brazil AI Market Report 2026](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-ai-market-report-2026): $2.5T economy, 70% services GDP, $4.5B AI investment — the structural setup for AI-native venture creation in Latin America's largest market. Market Report, 15 min.
- [Sigga Technologies: From Founding to 10× Exit](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/sigga-case-study-10x-exit): An inside-the-team case study on how a Brazilian industrial-software bet became a 10× exit — and the lessons now applied to every Avante studio venture. Case Study, 11 min.
- [Inside the Avante Operating Stack](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/inside-the-avante-operating-stack): The five layers of shared infrastructure every Avante venture inherits — and the layers we deliberately keep separate. The definitive piece on how the studio model actually works. Playbook, 10 min.

- [Início](https://avanteventures.com/pt): Missão, modelo, ventures, time, contato
- [Por Que Avante](https://avanteventures.com/pt/why-avante): Tese de investimento, dados de retorno, comparação vs VC tradicional
- [Biblioteca](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library): Insights, pesquisas, estudos de caso, playbooks, análises do mercado brasileiro
- [Portfólio](https://avanteventures.com/pt/portfolio): Cohort ativa do studio, exits realizados (Sigga 10×), e ventures alumni do time fundador
- [Para LPs / Investidores](https://avanteventures.com/pt/investors): Tese, estrutura e o bloco de transparência ("o que não faremos")
- [Princípios Operacionais](https://avanteventures.com/pt/principles): Os 10 princípios pelos quais o studio Avante opera. Não são valores — são regras que constrangem comportamento. Publicados como doutrina competitiva.

## Library Articles (engine-generated, full long-form, citable)

### English

- [Accelerator vs VC: Which One, and in What Order](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/accelerator-vs-vc-founder-guide): Accelerator vs VC compared on equity, stage, and sequencing. The real terms, when each comes first, and where a venture studio changes the math. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Agents vs Copilots: The Order That Builds a Moat](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-agents-vs-copilots-b2b): A copilot earns trust and starts the data loop. An agent compounds it. Why a B2B venture ships them in that order, not the reverse. Playbook, 10 min.
- [AI Capex 2026: The $700bn Build-Out Is a Subsidy for the Application Layer](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-capex-boom-application-layer-opportunity): AI capex 2026: the big four plan $700bn of infrastructure while models commoditize. Why the profit pool moves up the stack, and how LATAM builders capture it. Market Analysis, 11 min.
- [AI Coding Agents: Ship Zero-to-One Without Shipping Slop](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-coding-agents-zero-to-one-playbook): How to use AI coding agents to build zero-to-one fast without shipping slop. An eval-gated velocity playbook for a lean AI-native venture. Playbook, 10 min.
- [AI Customer Discovery: Validate a B2B Venture Faster](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-customer-discovery-b2b-playbook): How to run AI customer discovery to validate a B2B venture faster without faking conviction. A field playbook for the pre-launch build. Playbook, 9 min.
- [The AI Cost Curve Lets LATAM Ventures Skip the Series A](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-infrastructure-cost-curve-latam): The AI cost curve is collapsing inference cost about 10x a year. That routes capital from infrastructure to product and neutralizes LATAM's historic capital disadvantage right on time. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [How to Build an AI-Native Company Without Raising a Series A](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-native-without-series-a): AI inference is falling 10x a year, so you can launch lean. The moat is not the model. Here is what AI-native really means and where defensibility lives. Playbook, 9 min.
- [The Wrapper Trap: When AI-Native Is Actually Defensible](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ai-wrapper-trap-defensible-ai-native): A system prompt is not an AI wrapper moat. But a wrapper is not doomed either. Here is the line between thin and thick, and how the data flywheel crosses it. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Applied AI vs Generative AI: What a B2B Builder Should Care About](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/applied-ai-vs-generative-ai-b2b): Applied AI vs generative AI, explained for B2B founders. The real difference, why most defensible ventures are applied AI, and where the moat sits. Explainer, 9 min.
- [The AI Cold-Start Problem: Bootstrap Data Before You Have Users](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/bootstrap-ai-data-cold-start-playbook): Solve the AI cold start problem. Bootstrap your first proprietary data before you have users with expert labels, synthetic data, and a review loop. Playbook, 10 min.
- [AI in Brazilian Agriculture: The Agtech Build a Studio Would Make](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-ai-agriculture-agritech-opportunity): Brazil AI in agriculture grows past USD 260 million by 2034. A superpower in crops, a thin software layer. Here is where an AI-native venture fits. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [AI in Brazilian Cybersecurity: Where a Studio Would Build](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-ai-cybersecurity-opportunity): Brazil cybersecurity compounds toward USD 7 billion by 2030 with LGPD as the forcing function. Where an AI-native venture builds, and where a thin layer dies. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [AI in Brazilian Fintech: Where a Studio Would Actually Build](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-ai-fintech-market-opportunity): Brazil AI in fintech scales past USD 2 billion by 2034. Pix and Open Finance moved the moat from rails to underwriting. Here is where to build. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Brazil Computer Vision Market: The Build Behind the Plant and the Field](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-computer-vision-market-opportunity): The Brazil computer vision market scales past USD 800 million by 2030. The moat is a proprietary labeled dataset, not the model. Where a venture would build. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Brazil Generative AI Market: Where a Studio Would Build Past the Hype](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-generative-ai-market-opportunity): The Brazil generative AI market scales toward USD 1.5 billion by the mid-2030s. The model layer is not the moat. Here is where a venture actually builds. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Brazil Industrial AI Market: Where a Studio Would Build](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-industrial-ai-market-opportunity): The Brazil industrial AI market more than doubled to 41.9 percent factory adoption in two years. Past the numbers, here is where an AI-native venture would build. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [AI Receivables Automation in Brazil: A Quiet, Fundable Build](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-receivables-automation-ai-opportunity): Brazil receivables automation heads toward USD 591 million by 2033. A dense payments stack makes it a clean data-to-fund flywheel. Here is the build. Market Analysis, 9 min.
- [Brazil's Services Economy Is the Opportunity Nobody Is Building For](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazil-services-economy-opportunity): Services are roughly 70% of Brazilian GDP with low software penetration. The structural gap, the post-2021 capital reality, and why operators win it. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Brazil's Regulatory Complexity Is a Moat, Not Just a Cost](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/brazilian-regulatory-complexity-as-moat): The scar tissue of Brazilian tax, labor, and compliance keeps generalists out. Operators who lived it can encode it into software newcomers cannot copy. Essay, 10 min.
- [How to Build an AI Eval Harness for a Vertical Product](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/build-ai-eval-harness-playbook): How to build an AI eval harness that gates every deploy and lets you swap models without losing quality. A hands-on playbook for AI builders. Playbook, 11 min.
- [The Copilot-to-Data-to-Fund Flywheel, Explained](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/copilot-to-data-to-fund-flywheel): Ship a copilot to mint proprietary data, then turn that data into capital. The concrete mechanism, the failure mode, and how Avante runs it. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Data Network Effects in Vertical AI: The Real Moat](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/data-network-effects-vertical-ai): Data network effects are the moat in vertical AI: each customer's usage improves the product for the next, so it compounds faster than data decays. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Which AI Businesses Have Defensible Moats? A Founder's Self-Test](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/does-your-ai-startup-have-a-moat): Most AI startups have no real moat. Here is which AI businesses have defensible moats, and a five-part test to find yours. Essay, 10 min.
- [Domain Evals: The Moat That Survives Model Churn](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/domain-specific-evals-ai-moat): Models commoditize. The encoded judgment of what correct means does not. Why a domain eval suite is an underrated AI-native moat. Playbook, 10 min.
- [How to Fund an AI Startup Without VC in Latin America](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/funding-ai-startup-without-vc-latam): You can fund an AI startup without VC. Building is cheap now. Use revenue, services to product, grants, angels, or studio first-capital. Guide, 10 min.
- [How to Choose a Venture Studio: A Founder's Due-Diligence Checklist](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/how-to-choose-a-venture-studio): How to choose a venture studio: confirm it is really a studio, weigh operator depth, and get the equity and first-capital terms in writing. Guide, 10 min.
- [How Do Venture Studios Make Money? The Business Model, Explained](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/how-venture-studios-make-money): Venture studios make money by taking large founding equity in the few companies they co-build each year, then monetizing it at exit. The full model. Guide, 10 min.
- [Infinity Constellation Raised $24M to Mass-Produce AI Companies. That Is the Studio Thesis.](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/infinity-constellation-ai-studio-thesis): A US studio just raised $24M to build up to eight AI companies a year in professional services. Read against the venture studio model Avante runs in LATAM, the signal is clear. The studio is becoming an asset class. Market Note, 9 min.
- [AI Copilot Data Capture: Turn Usage Into Proprietary Data](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/instrument-copilot-proprietary-data-playbook): AI copilot data capture done right. How to instrument a copilot so usage becomes proprietary data, the playbook behind the copilot to data to fund flywheel. Playbook, 10 min.
- [The Lean AI Build Stack a 2-3 Person Venture Runs](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/lean-ai-build-stack-playbook): The lean AI build stack a 2-3 person venture actually runs, layer by layer, with a build-vs-buy rule for each. Skip the plumbing, own the moat. Playbook, 10 min.
- [The LP Case for a Dedicated Venture Studio Allocation](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/lp-allocation-case-venture-studios): Studio IRR runs near 50% against roughly 19% for traditional VC. How an LP should size, underwrite, and stress-test a venture studio allocation. Research Report, 11 min.
- [Venture Studio Performance Metrics: IRR vs TVPI vs DPI](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/measuring-studio-performance): IRR flatters, TVPI is paper, DPI is the only cash truth. A guide to venture studio performance metrics, the survivorship traps, and why the ~50% benchmark holds up. Research Report, 12 min.
- [How to Control LLM Inference Cost With Model Routing](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/model-routing-inference-cost-playbook): Control LLM inference cost with model routing without losing quality. Route cheap by default, escalate on demand, and gate every swap on evals. Playbook, 10 min.
- [How Operating-Partner Economics Actually Work in a Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/operating-partner-economics): A venture studio operating partner co-builds 3-4 ventures a year. A VC partner sits on 8-12 boards. The hours-to-ownership ratio is the whole story. Essay, 10 min.
- [RAG vs Fine-Tuning vs Long Context: The Build Decision](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/rag-vs-finetune-vs-long-context-playbook): RAG vs fine-tuning vs long context, decided as a build decision, not a preference. A decision tree and the data moat that actually compounds. Playbook, 11 min.
- [How to Productize a Services Business Into an AI Copilot](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/services-to-productized-ai-copilot-playbook): How to productize a services business into an AI copilot, step by step, and turn delivery data into a moat. Built for a services-heavy economy. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Shipping AI in Regulated Industries: A LATAM Playbook](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/ship-ai-regulated-latam-vertical-playbook): Shipping AI in regulated industries across LATAM without getting shut down. A playbook for LGPD, human oversight, audit trails, and PL 2338 risk tiers. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Accelerator vs VC: An Honest Guide for Founders](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/studio-vs-accelerator-vs-vc): Venture studio vs accelerator vs VC, compared on dilution, control, and speed. The real terms for each, and a clear answer for which founder should pick which. Comparison, 11 min.
- [Taste Is the Moat When AI Makes Building Cheap](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/taste-is-the-moat): Taste is the moat because AI made building cheap: the scarce, defensible edge is judgment about what to build, and what to leave out. Essay, 8 min.
- [Venture Builders: Brazil vs USA Benchmark](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-builders-brazil-vs-usa-benchmark): The US and Europe built the venture studio model. Brazil has almost none yet. A benchmark of the proven track record and why Brazil is the open lane. Benchmark, 11 min.
- [Venture Studio Founder Economics: The LATAM Equity Trade](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studio-founder-economics-latam): A venture studio's equity trade pays only when it removes real risk and time. What a LATAM founder gives up, what they get, and the math before you sign. Insight, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Accelerator: An Honest Guide for Founders](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studio-vs-accelerator-explained): Venture studio vs accelerator, compared on equity, stage, and what you get. Real accelerator terms, the studio trade, and which founder picks which. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Bootstrapping: Build Alone or Co-Found?](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studio-vs-bootstrapping): Venture studio vs bootstrapping, weighed on speed, capital, team, control, equity, and risk. When to build alone, and when a studio changes the math. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Incubator: An Honest Guide for Founders](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studio-vs-incubator-explained): Venture studio vs incubator, compared on idea origination, equity, and execution. The real difference between the two, and which founder should pick which. Comparison, 9 min.
- [Venture Studio vs VC: An Honest Guide for Founders](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/venture-studio-vs-vc-explained): Venture studio vs VC compared on dilution, control, and speed to traction. The real terms for each path, the GSSN return gap, and which founder picks which. Comparison, 11 min.
- [How a Venture Studio Picks Which Verticals to Build](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/vertical-ai-studio-portfolio-construction): With only 3-4 builds a year, vertical selection is the studio's highest-leverage call. The four-part test a slot must pass, and when to walk. Research Report, 11 min.
- [What Is a Startup Studio, and How Does It Work?](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/what-is-a-startup-studio): What is a startup studio? A company that builds startups in succession with a shared team, supplying the idea, founders, and first capital. How it works. Explainer, 9 min.
- [Why Venture Studios Outperform Traditional VC in LATAM](https://avanteventures.com/en/library/why-venture-studios-win-latam): Studio IRR runs near 50% against roughly 19% for traditional VC. The structural reason, the honest failure modes, and why Brazil amplifies the model. Research Report, 11 min.

### Português

- [Aceleradora vs VC: Qual Escolher, e em Que Ordem](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/accelerator-vs-vc-founder-guide): Aceleradora vs VC comparados em equity, estágio e sequência. Os termos reais, quando cada um vem primeiro e onde um venture studio muda a conta. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Agentes vs Copilots: a Ordem que Constrói um Moat](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-agents-vs-copilots-b2b): Um copilot ganha confiança e inicia o loop de dados. Um agente o multiplica. Por que uma venture B2B lança nessa ordem, e não no contrário. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Capex de IA 2026: a construção de US$ 700 bi que subsidia a camada de aplicação](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-capex-boom-application-layer-opportunity): Capex de IA 2026: US$ 700 bi em infraestrutura enquanto os modelos viram commodity. Por que o lucro migra para a camada de aplicação e como o Brasil captura. Market Analysis, 11 min.
- [Agentes de IA para Programar: do Zero ao Um sem Entregar Lixo](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-coding-agents-zero-to-one-playbook): Como usar agentes de IA para programar do zero ao um sem entregar lixo. Um playbook de velocidade com avaliação para uma venture AI-native enxuta. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Descoberta de Clientes com IA: Valide uma Venture B2B mais Rápido](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-customer-discovery-b2b-playbook): Como fazer descoberta de clientes com IA para validar uma venture B2B mais rápido sem forjar convicção. Um playbook de campo pré-lançamento. Playbook, 9 min.
- [A Curva de Custo da IA Deixa Ventures da América Latina Pularem a Série A](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-infrastructure-cost-curve-latam): O custo de inferência está despencando. Isso desloca capital de infraestrutura para produto e neutraliza, na hora certa, a desvantagem histórica de capital da América Latina. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Como Construir uma Empresa AI-Native Sem Levantar uma Série A](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-native-without-series-a): A inferência de IA cai 10x ao ano e dá para lançar enxuto. O moat não é o modelo. O que AI-native significa de verdade e onde mora a defensibilidade. Playbook, 9 min.
- [A Armadilha do Wrapper: Quando AI-Native É de Fato Defensável](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ai-wrapper-trap-defensible-ai-native): Um prompt de sistema não é um moat de wrapper de IA. Mas o wrapper não está condenado. Veja a linha entre fino e espesso, e como o flywheel de dados a cruza. Playbook, 10 min.
- [IA Aplicada vs IA Generativa: O Que um Builder B2B Deve Considerar](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/applied-ai-vs-generative-ai-b2b): IA aplicada vs IA generativa, explicada para fundadores B2B. A diferença real e por que as ventures mais defensáveis são IA aplicada e onde fica o moat. Explainer, 9 min.
- [O Problema de Cold Start em IA: Dados Antes de Ter Usuários](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/bootstrap-ai-data-cold-start-playbook): Como resolver o problema de cold start em IA e obter os primeiros dados proprietários antes de ter usuários, com rótulos de especialista e dados sintéticos. Playbook, 10 min.
- [IA na Agricultura Brasileira: o Build de Agtech que um Studio Faria](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-ai-agriculture-agritech-opportunity): A IA na agricultura no Brasil cresce além de US$ 260 milhões até 2034. Potência em lavoura, camada fina de software. Veja onde encaixa uma venture AI-native. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [IA na Cibersegurança Brasileira: Onde um Studio Construiria](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-ai-cybersecurity-opportunity): O mercado de cibersegurança no Brasil avança rumo a US$ 7 bilhões até 2030, com a LGPD como gatilho. Onde uma venture AI-native constrói de verdade. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [IA no Fintech Brasileiro: Onde um Studio de Fato Construiria](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-ai-fintech-market-opportunity): A IA em fintech no Brasil avança além de US$ 2 bilhões até 2034. Pix e Open Finance moveram o moat dos trilhos para o crédito. Veja onde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de Visão Computacional no Brasil: A Construção Por Trás da Fábrica e do Campo](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-computer-vision-market-opportunity): O mercado de visão computacional no Brasil supera US$ 800 milhões até 2030. O moat é um dataset rotulado proprietário, não o modelo. Veja onde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de IA Generativa no Brasil: Onde um Studio Construiria Além do Hype](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-generative-ai-market-opportunity): O mercado de IA generativa no Brasil escala rumo a US$ 1,5 bilhão até meados da década de 2030. A camada de modelo não é o moat. Veja onde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de IA Industrial no Brasil: Onde um Studio Construiria](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-industrial-ai-market-opportunity): O mercado de IA industrial no Brasil mais que dobrou para 41,9 por cento de adoção na indústria em dois anos. Além dos números, onde uma venture AI-native construiria. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Automação de Recebíveis com IA no Brasil: um Build Silencioso e Financiável](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-receivables-automation-ai-opportunity): A automação de recebíveis no Brasil caminha para US$ 591 milhões até 2033. Um stack de pagamentos denso a torna um flywheel limpo de dado para capital. Market Analysis, 9 min.
- [A Economia de Serviços do Brasil É a Oportunidade que Ninguém Está Atacando](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazil-services-economy-opportunity): Serviços são cerca de 70% do PIB brasileiro com baixa penetração de software. A lacuna estrutural, a realidade de capital e por que operadores vencem. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [A Complexidade Regulatória do Brasil É um Moat, Não Só um Custo](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/brazilian-regulatory-complexity-as-moat): As cicatrizes do tributário, do trabalhista e do compliance brasileiros barram generalistas. Operadores que viveram isso codificam tudo em software que recém-chegados não copiam. Essay, 10 min.
- [Como Construir uma Suite de Avaliação de IA para um Produto Vertical](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/build-ai-eval-harness-playbook): Como construir uma suite de avaliação de IA que trava cada deploy e permite trocar de modelo sem perder qualidade. Um playbook prático para builders. Playbook, 11 min.
- [O Flywheel Copilot para Dado para Fundo, Explicado](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/copilot-to-data-to-fund-flywheel): Lance um copilot para cunhar dado proprietário e transforme esse dado em capital. O mecanismo, a falha e como a Avante roda isso. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Onde Mora o Moat Quando o Modelo Vira Commodity](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/data-network-effects-vertical-ai): Alugue o modelo, seja dono do moat. Um playbook sobre dado proprietário, efeitos de rede de dados e process power em IA vertical, com os anti-moats a evitar. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Sua Startup Tem um Moat Defensável de IA? O Autoteste](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/does-your-ai-startup-have-a-moat): A maioria das startups de IA tem um demo, não um moat. Veja quais têm um moat defensável de IA com um autoteste de cinco partes. Essay, 10 min.
- [Evals de Domínio: o Moat que Sobrevive à Troca de Modelos](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/domain-specific-evals-ai-moat): Modelos viram commodity. O julgamento codificado do que é correto não. Por que uma suíte de evals de domínio é um moat AI-native subestimado. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Como Financiar uma Startup de IA Sem VC no Brasil](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/funding-ai-startup-without-vc-latam): Dá para financiar uma startup de IA sem VC. Construir ficou barato. Use receita, serviços que viram produto, editais, anjos ou capital de studio. Guide, 10 min.
- [Como Escolher um Venture Studio: Checklist de Due Diligence para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/how-to-choose-a-venture-studio): Como escolher um venture studio: confirme que é de fato um studio, avalie os operadores e exija os termos de equity e capital por escrito. Guide, 10 min.
- [Como Venture Studios Ganham Dinheiro? O Modelo de Negócio Explicado](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/how-venture-studios-make-money): Um venture studio ganha dinheiro sendo dono de equity nas empresas que co-constrói. Veja o mecanismo, de onde vem o dinheiro e por que o retorno demora. Guide, 10 min.
- [A Infinity Constellation levantou US$ 24M para produzir empresas de IA em escala. Essa é a tese do studio.](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/infinity-constellation-ai-studio-thesis): Um studio dos EUA acabou de levantar US$ 24M para construir até oito empresas de IA por ano em serviços profissionais. Lido ao lado do modelo que a Avante opera na América Latina, o sinal é claro. O studio está virando uma classe de ativos. Market Note, 9 min.
- [Dados Proprietários com Copilot de IA: O Playbook de Captura](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/instrument-copilot-proprietary-data-playbook): Dados proprietários com copilot de IA na prática. Como instrumentar o uso para virar dado proprietário, o playbook por trás do flywheel copilot, dado, capital. Playbook, 10 min.
- [O Stack de IA Enxuto que uma Venture de 2 a 3 Pessoas Roda](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/lean-ai-build-stack-playbook): O stack de IA enxuto que uma venture de 2 a 3 pessoas roda de fato, camada por camada, com uma regra de construir ou comprar para cada uma. Playbook, 10 min.
- [O Argumento para o LP Alocar de Forma Dedicada em Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/lp-allocation-case-venture-studios): O IRR de studios fica perto de 50% contra cerca de 19% do VC tradicional. Como um LP deve dimensionar, avaliar e testar uma alocação em studio. Research Report, 11 min.
- [Como Medir de Verdade um Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/measuring-studio-performance): O IRR enfeita, o TVPI é papel, o DPI é a única verdade em caixa. Um guia das métricas de venture studio, das armadilhas de sobrevivência e do benchmark de ~50%. Research Report, 12 min.
- [Como Controlar o Custo de Inferência de LLM com Roteamento de Modelos](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/model-routing-inference-cost-playbook): Controle o custo de inferência de LLM com roteamento de modelos sem perder qualidade. Barato por padrão, caro sob demanda, e cada troca com avaliação. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Como Funciona de Verdade a Economia do Operating Partner em um Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/operating-partner-economics): Um operating partner de venture studio cocria 3-4 ventures por ano. Um sócio de VC senta em 8-12 conselhos. A razão horas-por-ownership conta a história toda. Essay, 10 min.
- [RAG vs Fine-Tuning vs Contexto Longo: a Decisão de Build](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/rag-vs-finetune-vs-long-context-playbook): RAG vs fine-tuning vs contexto longo decidido como uma decisão de build, não preferência. Uma árvore de decisão e o moat que de fato se acumula. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Como Produtizar um Negócio de Serviços em um Copilot de IA](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/services-to-productized-ai-copilot-playbook): Como produtizar um negócio de serviços em um copilot de IA, passo a passo, e transformar dados de entrega em moat. Feito para uma economia de serviços. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Como Lançar Funcionalidades de IA em Setores Regulados na América Latina](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/ship-ai-regulated-latam-vertical-playbook): Como lançar IA em setores regulados na América Latina sem ser barrado. Um playbook de LGPD, supervisão humana, trilha de auditoria e o PL 2338. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Studio, Aceleradora ou VC: Um Guia Honesto para Escolher](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/studio-vs-accelerator-vs-vc): Studio, aceleradora e VC trocam diluição, controle e velocidade de formas diferentes. Os termos reais de cada um e qual fundador escolhe o quê. Comparison, 11 min.
- [Quando Construir Fica Barato, o Moat é o Critério](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/taste-is-the-moat): A IA derrubou o custo de construir. A carreira de Tony Fadell explica o que fica escasso em seguida, e onde mora de verdade a defensibilidade de uma empresa AI-native. Essay, 8 min.
- [Benchmark de Venture Studio: O Histórico dos EUA e a Brecha do Brasil](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-builders-brazil-vs-usa-benchmark): Um benchmark dos studios que criaram o modelo nos EUA e na Europa, o que ele retorna, e por que o Brasil é a pista aberta para um AI-native. Benchmark, 11 min.
- [O Lado do Fundador no Deal de Venture Studio na América Latina](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-studio-founder-economics-latam): Um studio pega equity do fundador cedo. Quando essa troca compensa para um operador da América Latina, quando não, e as contas antes de assinar. Insight, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Aceleradora: Um Guia Honesto para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-studio-vs-accelerator-explained): Venture studio vs aceleradora, comparados em equity, estágio e o que você recebe. Os termos reais da aceleradora e qual fundador escolhe o quê. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Bootstrapping: Construir Sozinho ou Cofundar?](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-studio-vs-bootstrapping): Venture studio vs bootstrapping: velocidade, capital, time, controle, equity e risco. Quando construir sozinho e quando um studio muda a conta. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Incubadora: Um Guia Honesto para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-studio-vs-incubator-explained): Venture studio vs incubadora, comparados em origem da ideia, equity e execução. A diferença real entre os dois e qual fundador deve escolher cada um. Comparison, 9 min.
- [Venture Studio vs VC: Um Guia Honesto para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/venture-studio-vs-vc-explained): Venture studio vs VC comparados em diluição, controle e velocidade até a tração. Os termos reais de cada caminho, o gap de retorno da GSSN e quem escolhe o quê. Comparison, 11 min.
- [Como um Venture Studio Escolhe em Quais Verticais Construir](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/vertical-ai-studio-portfolio-construction): Com 3 a 4 builds por ano, escolher a vertical é a decisão de maior alavancagem do studio. O teste de quatro partes antes de gastar um slot. Research Report, 11 min.
- [O que é um venture studio e como ele funciona](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/what-is-a-startup-studio): Saiba o que é um venture studio. Uma empresa que cria startups em série com time e processo compartilhados, fornecendo ideia, time e capital de primeiro cheque. Explainer, 9 min.
- [Por que Venture Studios Superam o VC Tradicional na América Latina](https://avanteventures.com/pt/library/why-venture-studios-win-latam): O IRR de studios fica perto de 50% contra cerca de 19% do VC tradicional. A razão estrutural, as falhas do modelo e por que o Brasil amplifica tudo. Research Report, 11 min.

### Español

- [Aceleradora vs VC: Cuál Elegir, y en Qué Orden](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/accelerator-vs-vc-founder-guide): Aceleradora vs VC comparados en equity, etapa y secuencia. Los términos reales, cuándo viene primero cada cual y dónde un venture studio cambia la cuenta. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Agentes vs Copilots: el Orden que Construye un Moat](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-agents-vs-copilots-b2b): Un copilot gana confianza e inicia el loop de datos. Un agente lo multiplica. Por qué una venture B2B lanza en ese orden, y no al revés. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Capex de IA 2026: US$ 700 mil millones que subsidian la capa de aplicación](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-capex-boom-application-layer-opportunity): Capex de IA 2026: US$ 700 mil millones en infraestructura mientras los modelos se vuelven commodity. Por qué la ganancia migra a la capa de aplicación en LATAM. Market Analysis, 11 min.
- [Agentes de IA para Programar: del Cero al Uno sin Entregar Basura](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-coding-agents-zero-to-one-playbook): Cómo usar agentes de IA para programar del cero al uno sin entregar basura. Un playbook de velocidad con evaluación para una venture AI-native. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Descubrimiento de Clientes con IA: Valida una Venture B2B más Rápido](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-customer-discovery-b2b-playbook): Cómo hacer descubrimiento de clientes con IA para validar una venture B2B más rápido sin fingir convicción. Un playbook de campo pre-lanzamiento. Playbook, 9 min.
- [La Curva de Costo de la IA Permite a las Ventures de LATAM Saltarse la Serie A](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-infrastructure-cost-curve-latam): El costo de inferencia se desploma. Eso mueve el capital de la infraestructura al producto y neutraliza, justo a tiempo, la desventaja histórica de capital de LATAM. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Cómo Construir una Empresa AI-Native Sin Levantar una Serie A](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-native-without-series-a): La inferencia de IA cae 10x al año y puedes lanzar enjuto. El moat no es el modelo. Qué significa AI-native de verdad y dónde vive la defensibilidad. Playbook, 9 min.
- [La Trampa del Wrapper: Cuando AI-Native Es Realmente Defendible](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ai-wrapper-trap-defensible-ai-native): Un prompt de sistema no es un moat de wrapper de IA. Pero el wrapper tampoco está condenado. La línea entre fino y grueso, y cómo el flywheel la cruza. Playbook, 10 min.
- [IA Aplicada vs IA Generativa: Qué Debe Considerar un Builder B2B](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/applied-ai-vs-generative-ai-b2b): IA aplicada vs IA generativa, explicada para fundadores B2B. La diferencia real y por qué las ventures más defensables son IA aplicada y dónde está el moat. Explainer, 9 min.
- [El Problema de Cold Start en IA: Datos Antes de Tener Usuarios](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/bootstrap-ai-data-cold-start-playbook): Cómo resolver el problema de cold start en IA y obtener los primeros datos propietarios antes de tener usuarios, con etiquetas de experto y datos sintéticos. Playbook, 10 min.
- [IA en la Agricultura Brasileña: el Build de Agtech que Haría un Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-ai-agriculture-agritech-opportunity): La IA en agricultura en Brasil crece más allá de USD 260 millones hacia 2034. Potencia en cultivos, capa fina de software. Aquí encaja una venture AI-native. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [IA en la Ciberseguridad Brasileña: Dónde Construiría un Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-ai-cybersecurity-opportunity): El mercado de ciberseguridad en Brasil avanza hacia USD 7 mil millones para 2030, con la LGPD como detonante. Dónde construye una venture AI-native. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [IA en el Fintech Brasileño: Dónde un Studio Realmente Construiría](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-ai-fintech-market-opportunity): La IA en fintech en Brasil supera los USD 2 mil millones hacia 2034. Pix y Open Finance movieron el moat de los rieles al crédito. Dónde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de Visión por Computadora en Brasil: La Construcción Detrás de la Planta y el Campo](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-computer-vision-market-opportunity): El mercado de visión por computadora en Brasil supera los USD 800 millones para 2030. El moat es un dataset etiquetado propio, no el modelo. Dónde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de IA Generativa en Brasil: Dónde Construiría un Studio Más Allá del Hype](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-generative-ai-market-opportunity): El mercado de IA generativa en Brasil escala hacia USD 1,5 mil millones para mediados de la década de 2030. La capa de modelo no es el moat. Dónde construir. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Mercado de IA Industrial en Brasil: Dónde Construiría un Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-industrial-ai-market-opportunity): El mercado de IA industrial en Brasil más que duplicó la adopción en planta a 41,9 por ciento en dos años. Más allá de los números, dónde construiría una venture AI-native. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [Automatización de Cobranzas con IA en Brasil: un Build Silencioso y Financiable](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-receivables-automation-ai-opportunity): La automatización de cobranzas en Brasil avanza hacia USD 591 millones para 2033. Un stack de pagos denso la hace un flywheel limpio de dato a capital. Market Analysis, 9 min.
- [La Economía de Servicios de Brasil Es la Oportunidad que Nadie Está Atacando](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazil-services-economy-opportunity): Los servicios son cerca del 70% del PIB brasileño con baja penetración de software. La brecha estructural, la realidad de capital y por qué ganan los operadores. Market Analysis, 10 min.
- [La Complejidad Regulatoria de Brasil Es un Moat, No Solo un Costo](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/brazilian-regulatory-complexity-as-moat): Las cicatrices del régimen tributario, laboral y de compliance brasileño dejan fuera a los generalistas. El operador que las vivió las codifica en software que nadie copia rápido. Essay, 10 min.
- [Cómo Construir una Suite de Evaluación de IA para un Producto Vertical](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/build-ai-eval-harness-playbook): Cómo construir una suite de evaluación de IA que bloquea cada deploy y permite cambiar de modelo sin perder calidad. Un playbook práctico para builders. Playbook, 11 min.
- [El Flywheel Copilot a Dato a Fondo, Explicado](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/copilot-to-data-to-fund-flywheel): Lanza un copilot para acuñar dato propietario y convierte ese dato en capital. El mecanismo, la falla y cómo lo corre Avante. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Dónde Vive el Moat Cuando el Modelo Es un Commodity](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/data-network-effects-vertical-ai): Renta el modelo, sé dueño del moat. Un playbook sobre dato propietario, efectos de red de datos y process power en IA vertical, con los anti-moats a evitar. Playbook, 11 min.
- [¿Tu Startup Tiene un Moat Defendible de IA? La Autoevaluación](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/does-your-ai-startup-have-a-moat): La mayoría de las startups de IA tiene un demo, no un moat. Descubre cuáles tienen un moat defendible de IA con una autoevaluación. Essay, 10 min.
- [Evals de Dominio: el Moat que Sobrevive al Cambio de Modelos](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/domain-specific-evals-ai-moat): Los modelos se vuelven commodity. El juicio codificado de qué es correcto no. Por qué una suite de evals de dominio es un moat AI-native subestimado. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Cómo Financiar una Startup de IA Sin VC en LATAM](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/funding-ai-startup-without-vc-latam): Puedes financiar una startup de IA sin VC. Construir es barato. Usa ingresos, servicios que se vuelven producto, subsidios, ángeles o capital de studio. Guide, 10 min.
- [Cómo Elegir un Venture Studio: Checklist de Due Diligence para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/how-to-choose-a-venture-studio): Cómo elegir un venture studio: confirma que es de verdad un studio, evalúa a los operadores y exige los términos de equity y capital por escrito. Guide, 10 min.
- [¿Cómo Ganan Dinero los Venture Studios? El Modelo de Negocio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/how-venture-studios-make-money): Un venture studio gana dinero siendo dueño de equity en las empresas que cocrea. Toma una participación fundadora grande y cobra en la salida. Así funciona el modelo. Guide, 10 min.
- [Infinity Constellation levantó US$ 24M para producir empresas de IA en serie. Esa es la tesis del studio.](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/infinity-constellation-ai-studio-thesis): Un studio de EE. UU. acaba de levantar US$ 24M para construir hasta ocho empresas de IA al año en servicios profesionales. Leído junto al modelo que opera Avante en América Latina, la señal es clara. El studio se está volviendo una clase de activo. Market Note, 9 min.
- [Datos Propietarios con Copilot de IA: El Playbook de Captura](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/instrument-copilot-proprietary-data-playbook): Datos propietarios con copilot de IA en la práctica. El playbook de instrumentación detrás del flywheel copilot, dato, capital. Playbook, 10 min.
- [El Stack de IA Mínimo que una Venture de 2 a 3 Personas Corre](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/lean-ai-build-stack-playbook): El stack de IA mínimo que una venture de 2 a 3 personas corre de verdad, capa por capa, con una regla de construir o comprar para cada una. Playbook, 10 min.
- [El Argumento para que un LP Asigne de Forma Dedicada a Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/lp-allocation-case-venture-studios): El IRR de los studios ronda el 50% frente a cerca del 19% del VC tradicional. Cómo un LP debe dimensionar, evaluar y estresar una asignación a studio. Research Report, 11 min.
- [Cómo Medir de Verdad un Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/measuring-studio-performance): El IRR adorna, el TVPI es papel, el DPI es la única verdad en caja. Una guía de las métricas de venture studio, las trampas de supervivencia y el benchmark de ~50%. Research Report, 12 min.
- [Cómo Controlar el Costo de Inferencia de LLM con Enrutamiento de Modelos](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/model-routing-inference-cost-playbook): Controle el costo de inferencia de LLM con enrutamiento de modelos sin perder calidad. Barato por defecto, caro bajo demanda, y cada cambio con evals. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Cómo Funciona de Verdad la Economía del Operating Partner en un Venture Studio](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/operating-partner-economics): Un operating partner de venture studio coconstruye 3-4 ventures al año. Un socio de VC se sienta en 8-12 directorios. La razón horas-por-equity lo explica todo. Essay, 10 min.
- [RAG vs Fine-Tuning vs Contexto Largo: la Decisión de Build](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/rag-vs-finetune-vs-long-context-playbook): RAG vs fine-tuning vs contexto largo decidido como una decisión de build, no preferencia. Un árbol de decisión y el moat que de verdad se acumula. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Cómo Productizar un Negocio de Servicios en un Copilot de IA](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/services-to-productized-ai-copilot-playbook): Cómo productizar un negocio de servicios en un copilot de IA, paso a paso, y convertir los datos de entrega en moat. Para una economía de servicios. Playbook, 10 min.
- [Cómo Lanzar Funciones de IA en Sectores Regulados en América Latina](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/ship-ai-regulated-latam-vertical-playbook): Cómo lanzar IA en sectores regulados en América Latina sin ser bloqueado. Un playbook de LGPD, supervisión humana, trazabilidad y el PL 2338. Playbook, 11 min.
- [Studio, Aceleradora o VC: Una Guía Honesta para Elegir](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/studio-vs-accelerator-vs-vc): Studio, aceleradora y VC intercambian dilución, control y velocidad de forma distinta. Los términos reales de cada uno y qué fundador elige cuál. Comparison, 11 min.
- [Taste Is the Moat When AI Makes Building Cheap](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/taste-is-the-moat): Taste is the moat because AI made building cheap: the scarce, defensible edge is judgment about what to build, and what to leave out. Essay, 8 min.
- [Benchmark de Venture Studio: El Historial de EE. UU. y la Brecha de Brasil](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-builders-brazil-vs-usa-benchmark): Un benchmark de los studios que crearon el modelo en EE. UU. y Europa, lo que retorna, y por qué Brasil es el carril abierto para uno AI-native. Benchmark, 11 min.
- [El Lado del Fundador en el Deal de Venture Studio en LATAM](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-studio-founder-economics-latam): Un studio toma equity del fundador temprano. Cuando esa decisión conviene a un operador de LATAM, cuando no, y los números antes de firmar. Insight, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Aceleradora: Una Guía Honesta para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-studio-vs-accelerator-explained): Venture studio vs aceleradora, comparados en equity, etapa y lo que recibes. Los términos reales de la aceleradora y qué fundador elige cuál. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Bootstrapping: ¿Construir Solo o Cofundar?](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-studio-vs-bootstrapping): Venture studio vs bootstrapping: velocidad, capital, equipo, control, equity y riesgo. Cuándo construir solo y cuándo un studio cambia la cuenta. Comparison, 10 min.
- [Venture Studio vs Incubadora: Una Guía Honesta para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-studio-vs-incubator-explained): Venture studio vs incubadora, comparados en origen de la idea, equity y ejecución. La diferencia real entre los dos y qué fundador debe elegir cada uno. Comparison, 9 min.
- [Venture Studio vs VC: Una Guía Honesta para Fundadores](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/venture-studio-vs-vc-explained): Venture studio vs VC comparados en dilución, control y velocidad hacia la tracción. Los términos reales de cada camino y la brecha de retorno de GSSN. Comparison, 11 min.
- [Cómo un Venture Studio Elige en Qué Verticales Construir](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/vertical-ai-studio-portfolio-construction): Con 3 a 4 builds al año, elegir la vertical es la decisión de mayor apalancamiento del studio. El test de cuatro partes antes de gastar un cupo. Research Report, 11 min.
- [Qué es un venture studio y cómo funciona](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/what-is-a-startup-studio): Qué es un venture studio. Una empresa que construye startups en serie con un equipo compartido, aportando la idea, el equipo fundador y el primer capital. Explainer, 9 min.
- [Por qué los Venture Studios Superan al VC Tradicional en LATAM](https://avanteventures.com/es/library/why-venture-studios-win-latam): El IRR de los studios ronda el 50% frente a cerca del 19% del VC tradicional. La razón estructural, las fallas del modelo y por qué Brasil lo amplifica. Research Report, 11 min.

<!-- CONTENT-ENGINE:END -->
